gpt55_review_summary: Initial review found P2 raw Jobs API payload persisted by get --summary and P3 missing package-root exports. I changed summary mode to omit the raw response unless --include-response is explicit, exported DATABRICKS_RUN_STATUS_RECORD_TYPE and summarize_databricks_run from the root facade, added regression tests, reran full tests/build, and re-review returned clean.
verification: poetry run pytest -q tests/test_databricks_runs.py tests/test_databricks_job.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py
GPT-5.5 review clean after resolving P2 summary raw-response leakage and P3 package-root export findings
what_changed: Added compact Databricks Jobs run status summaries for managed benchmark/release automation.
Exposed a document_kv.databricks_run_status.v1 record with run/task lifecycle states, result state, active task key, cluster ids, timing, and success/terminal flags.
Made databricks_runs get --summary emit a summary-only artifact by default, with --include-response as the explicit raw Jobs API debug path.
Exported the run-status helper and record constant through the document_kv_cache package facade.
why: Release automation needs a stable, compact, sanitized summary of Databricks job progress and completion before collecting benchmark, storage, engine-probe, and bundle artifacts.
